steps.prompt:
You are a senior frontend architect. Design the Phase 1 (scaffold) + Phase 2 (infra) implementation plan for a new Lair mini app called '레어헬스' (ID: lair-health).

Context:
- Lair repo: /Users/bugbookee/Desktop/ai/lair/lair-app-v2/
- Reference app: apps/web/ (existing mini app — READ this for patterns)
- New app target path: apps/lair-health/
- apps/web package.json deps: react 19.2.4, react-dom 19.2.4, react-router-dom ^7.6.0, zustand ^5.0.0, i18next ^25.1.0, react-i18next ^15.4.0, vite ^7.3.1, typescript ~5.9.3
- Workspace packages: @bug4city/api-client, @bug4city/bridge, @bug4city/shared, @bug4city/miniapp-sdk
- miniapp-sdk: packages/miniapp-sdk/src/client.ts (LairMiniAppClient class with auth, device, walk, host, events namespaces)

Purpose of lair-health:
- Ports GLP-Care (React Native calorie/medication tracking app) to a Lair mini app (React web)
- GLP-Care source: /Users/bugbookee/.paperclip/instances/default/projects/c130b9f3-5855-47c1-a128-b16f07ebdc69/12805932-2b62-4dff-93e9-39732f9e3926/_default/mobile/
  - Main screen: app/(tabs)/index.tsx (meal tracking dashboard)
  - Medication screen: app/(tabs)/injection.tsx (medication management + calendar)
  - API layer: src/lib/medicationApi.ts, src/lib/mealApi.ts (Fastify backend on port 3001)

Design output must include ALL of the following sections:

## 1. Folder Structure
Full tree for apps/lair-health/src/ including: pages/, components/, store/, services/, theme/, i18n/, lib/, hooks/
List every file to be created with 1-line description.

## 2. package.json
Full content. name: @bug4city/lair-health. Copy deps from apps/web, add nothing extra.

## 3. Vite Config
Full vite.config.ts. base: '/miniapp/lair-health/', same proxy pattern as apps/web, port 5175.

## 4. TypeScript Config
Full tsconfig.json, tsconfig.app.json, tsconfig.node.json (strict: true).

## 5. ESLint Config
Full eslint.config.js (same as apps/web).

## 6. index.html
Full content. title: 레어헬스. mount on #root.

## 7. src/main.tsx bootstrap
Full content. Init LairMiniAppClient, call ready(), inject auth token from bridge init data, vConsole in dev. Korean font.

## 8. App.tsx routing
Full content. Routes:
- / → MealDashboardPage (홈)
- /medication → MedicationPage
- /medication/add → MedicationAddPage
- /medication/:id/edit → MedicationEditPage
- /settings → SettingsPage
Use BrowserRouter with basename. Lazy load all pages.

## 9. Zustand Store Designs
For each store (medicationStore, mealStore, uiStore): list state fields + actions with TypeScript types.

## 10. services/api.ts
Full implementation: fetch wrapper with auth header (from Zustand token), retry once on 401 (token refresh via bridge), NetworkError class, typed parseOrThrow<T>().

## 11. services/medicationApi.ts
Full implementation ported from mobile/src/lib/medicationApi.ts. Replace authFetch pattern with the new api.ts fetch wrapper. Keep all types (MedicationData, MedicationLogData, etc.).

## 12. services/mealApi.ts
Full implementation ported from mobile app mealApi patterns. MealLog CRUD, food search, upload URL.

## 13. theme/tokens.ts
Full: color tokens (PRIMARY #10B981, BG #F8FAFC, CARD #FFFFFF, TEXT #0F172A, SUBTEXT #64748B, etc.), typography scale, spacing scale, radius.

## 14. theme/global.css
Full: CSS reset + body font (Noto Sans KR) + CSS custom properties from tokens.

## 15. lib/storage.ts
LocalStorage wrapper. Key prefix: lair-health:.

## 16. lib/lair-client.ts
Init singleton LairMiniAppClient from @bug4city/miniapp-sdk. Export lairClient. Handle case where not in host app.

## 17. hooks/useSession.ts
Get session from lairClient.auth.getInitData(). Expose userId, token, nickname, isInHostApp.

## 18. hooks/useMedications.ts
Wrap medicationStore. Expose medications, logs, loading, error, reload, toggleCheck.

## 19. hooks/useMeals.ts
Wrap mealStore. Expose todayLogs, loading, error, createLog, deleteLog.

## 20. i18n setup
ko.json keys for all UI strings used in GLP-Care (medication names, meal dashboard strings). i18n.ts init file.

## 21. components/OfflineBanner.tsx
Full implementation. Shows when offline.

## 22. components/ErrorBoundary.tsx
Full React error boundary.

Output this entire design as a Markdown document. Be specific and complete — codex will implement from this design directly.

Read the design document from the previous step. Implement Phase 1: scaffold the apps/lair-health/ mini app.

CRITICAL RULES:
1. Create ALL files listed in 'files'. Write complete file contents, not stubs.
2. Page components must be real placeholder components (not empty), showing a Korean title and a brief description of what the page will contain.
3. App.tsx must use React Router DOM v7 BrowserRouter with lazy-loaded pages, Suspense fallback.
4. main.tsx must:
   - Import LairMiniAppClient from @bug4city/miniapp-sdk
   - Create singleton lairClient
   - Call lairClient.ready() on mount
   - Inject Noto Sans KR via Google Fonts or style tag
   - Enable vConsole in DEV
5. package.json name must be @bug4city/lair-health, version 0.0.1, same deps as apps/web reference.
6. vite.config.ts: base '/miniapp/lair-health/', port 5175, same proxy pattern as apps/web.
7. tsconfig.json: strict: true, target ES2022.
8. eslint.config.js: copy apps/web pattern exactly.
9. .env.example: VITE_API_BASE_URL=https://dev-api.lair.fi
10. DO NOT modify apps/web or any other existing files.

Reference: apps/web/package.json, apps/web/vite.config.ts, apps/web/tsconfig.json, apps/web/eslint.config.js, apps/web/index.html, apps/web/src/main.tsx for exact patterns.

Write complete, production-quality TypeScript. No TODOs in code.

Read the design document from step 'design' and the Phase 1 scaffold from step 'phase1-scaffold'. Implement Phase 2: infrastructure layer for apps/lair-health/.

Reference files to READ (do not modify):
- /Users/bugbookee/.paperclip/instances/default/projects/c130b9f3-5855-47c1-a128-b16f07ebdc69/12805932-2b62-4dff-93e9-39732f9e3926/_default/mobile/src/lib/medicationApi.ts (port this)
- /Users/bugbookee/Desktop/ai/lair/lair-app-v2/packages/miniapp-sdk/src/client.ts (SDK reference)
- /Users/bugbookee/Desktop/ai/lair/lair-app-v2/apps/web/src/store/authStore.ts (Zustand pattern)

Implementation requirements per file:

**lib/lairClient.ts**: Export singleton `lairClient = new LairMiniAppClient()`. Export `isInHostApp()` helper. Handle SSR-safe window access.

**lib/storage.ts**: localStorage wrapper with key prefix 'lair-health:'. getItem<T>, setItem, removeItem, clear (prefix only). All sync.

**services/api.ts**:
- `apiFetch(path, options)` — adds Authorization header from uiStore token
- 401 → tries lairClient.auth.requestTokenRefresh(), retries once
- Network failure → throws NetworkError
- Export `parseOrThrow<T>(res, label)` → returns body.data
- Export `NetworkError` class
- VITE_API_BASE_URL from import.meta.env

**services/medicationApi.ts**: Port mobile/src/lib/medicationApi.ts exactly but:
- Use apiFetch from services/api.ts instead of custom authFetch
- Remove AsyncStorage, use storage.ts where needed
- Keep all TypeScript interfaces (MedicationData, MedicationScheduleData, DosageHistoryData, MedicationLogData, etc.)
- Keep all functions: fetchMedications, createMedication, updateMedication, deleteMedication, fetchMedicationLogs, upsertMedicationLog

**services/mealApi.ts**:
- MealLogData interface: { id, userId, loggedAt, foodName, caloriesKcal, proteinG, carbsG, fatG, imageUrl?, isManuallyEdited }
- fetchMealLogs(date: string): Promise<MealLogData[]>
- createMealLog(input): Promise<MealLogData>
- updateMealLog(id, input): Promise<MealLogData>
- deleteMealLog(id): Promise<void>
- getAnalyzeUploadUrl(extension: string): Promise<{ uploadUrl: string; fileUrl: string }>
- analyzeMealImage(imageUrl: string): Promise<{ foodName: string; caloriesKcal: number; proteinG: number; carbsG: number; fatG: number; confidence: number; quotaRemaining: number }>

**store/medicationStore.ts** (Zustand v5):
- State: medications: MedicationData[], logs: MedicationLogData[], loading, error
- Actions: loadMedications(), loadLogs(from, to), addMedication(), updateMedication(), deleteMedication(), upsertLog()

**store/mealStore.ts** (Zustand v5):
- State: todayLogs: MealLogData[], loading, error, selectedDate: string
- Actions: loadTodayLogs(), setSelectedDate(), addLog(), updateLog(), deleteLog()

**store/uiStore.ts** (Zustand v5):
- State: token: string | null, isOffline: boolean, theme: 'light' | 'dark'
- Actions: setToken(), setOffline(), setTheme()
- Persist token to storage.ts

**theme/tokens.ts**: TypeScript const object. Colors: PRIMARY='#10B981', PRIMARY_DARK='#059669', BG='#F8FAFC', CARD='#FFFFFF', TEXT='#0F172A', SUBTEXT='#64748B', SUCCESS_BG='#D1FAE5', SUCCESS_TEXT='#059669', ERROR='#EF4444', WARNING='#F97316'. Typography: 12/14/15/16/18/24. Spacing: 4/8/12/16/20/24. Radius: 8/12/14/16/999.

**theme/global.css**: Import Noto Sans KR from Google Fonts. CSS reset. CSS vars from tokens. Body background BG color. Mobile-first: max-width 430px centered.

**hooks/useSession.ts**: Read lairClient.auth.getInitData(). Return { userId, token, nickname, isInHostApp, platform }. Fall back to uiStore.token if not in host app.

**hooks/useMedications.ts**: Thin wrapper over medicationStore. Expose medications, logs, loading, error, reload(), toggleCheck(medicationId, scheduleId, date).

**hooks/useMeals.ts**: Thin wrapper over mealStore. Expose todayLogs, loading, error, reload(), addLog(), deleteLog().

**i18n/ko.json**: Korean strings for all UI text from GLP-Care: 'medication.title', 'medication.add', 'medication.empty', 'meal.title', 'meal.add', 'meal.empty', 'meal.protein', 'meal.calories', 'meal.carbs', 'meal.fat', 'common.loading', 'common.error', 'common.retry', 'common.offline', 'common.save', 'common.cancel', 'common.delete', 'common.edit', 'settings.title', 'settings.logout'. At minimum 30 keys.

**i18n/i18n.ts**: init i18next with react-i18next, lng: 'ko', resources: { ko }. Export default i18n instance.

**components/OfflineBanner.tsx**: Shows a fixed bottom banner '#EF4444' bg when uiStore.isOffline. Korean text '오프라인 상태 — 인터넷 연결을 확인해 주세요'. Fade in/out with CSS transition.

**components/ErrorBoundary.tsx**: Class component. Shows Korean error UI with retry button. Catches React render errors.

CRITICAL: Write complete TypeScript code. No TODOs. strict mode compatible. No 'any' unless unavoidable. All imports must be correct relative paths.

Review the Phase 1 + Phase 2 implementation of the 'lair-health' Lair mini app.

Evaluate the following files in apps/lair-health/:
- All scaffold files (package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig files, eslint.config.js, index.html, main.tsx, App.tsx)
- All page placeholders
- lib/lairClient.ts, lib/storage.ts
- services/api.ts, services/medicationApi.ts, services/mealApi.ts
- store/medicationStore.ts, store/mealStore.ts, store/uiStore.ts
- theme/tokens.ts, theme/global.css
- hooks/useSession.ts, hooks/useMedications.ts, hooks/useMeals.ts
- i18n/ko.json, i18n/i18n.ts
- components/OfflineBanner.tsx, components/ErrorBoundary.tsx

Score each category 0-10:
1. Lair SDK compliance — correct LairMiniAppClient usage, ready() call, auth init from bridge
2. TypeScript strictness — no implicit any, correct types, strict-compatible
3. React 19 patterns — no legacy patterns, proper hooks usage
4. Architecture quality — clean separation, store/service/hook pattern
5. Code completeness — no empty stubs, no TODOs left

For each issue found:
- Severity: CRITICAL / WARN / NOTE
- File + line
- What's wrong
- How to fix

Final output:
## Score: X/10
## Verdict: PASS / FAIL (threshold: 8/10)
## Issues (list all)
## Summary (2-3 sentences)

Be strict. FAIL if any CRITICAL issues exist.
